description: This component is used as a base component for other components like PhotoMetadata

fields.LocationName: Name of the world the photo was taken in.
fields.LocationURL: The url of the world the photo was taken in.
fields.LocationHost: The host user of the session the photo was taken in.
fields.LocationAccessLevel: The access level of the world the photo was taken in.
fields.LocationHiddenFromListing: whether the photo was taken in a hidden world or not.
fields.TimeTaken: The time the photo was taken.
fields.TakenBy: the user who took the photo.
fields.TakenGlobalPosition: The Position the Asset was generated in global space.
fields.TakenGlobalRotation: The rotation the Asset was generated in global space.
fields.TakenGlobalScale: The scale of the point this Asset was generated in global space.
fields.AppVersion: The Version of the game the photo was taken in.
fields.UserInfos: A list of users present in the session when the photo was taken.
fields.__legacyPresentUsers: A list of users present in the session when the photo was taken. This is internal legacy data.

usage: This component is used as a base component for other components like PhotoMetadata
